title: URL Whitelist
description: Single source of truth for approved source domains used by both the Python backend pipeline and the TypeScript admin dashboard.

version.description: Schema version number — increment when making breaking changes to the structure.

schema_url.description: Canonical URL of this JSON Schema file.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last modification to this whitelist.

domains.description: Ordered list of approved source domains.

domain.description: Bare domain name without protocol or trailing slash (e.g. 'theguardian.com').

tier.description: Closed classification tier for the domain.

rationale.description: One-sentence explanation of why this domain is on the whitelist and how it is used.

added_at.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this domain was first added to the whitelist.
